Document:
# Big Boss SOP This is the list of procedures, responsibilities, and duties of [color=#1b67a5][bold]Big Boss[/bold][/color].
1. Big Boss should [bold]NOT[/bold] act as a Security Officer. Their Job is to manage and help the station. Any deviation without reasonable reason may be grounds for demotion.
2. If a Department lacks a Head of Staff, Big Boss should make an effort to appoint an Acting Head of Staff, if there are available personnel to fill the position. Said Acting Head of Staff must be a member of the Department they are to lead. The Acting Head of Staff must have the prefix 'Acting' in front of their title, and be relieved of duty when a new one is hired by Nanotrasen. Refer to [bold]Hiring/Transfer Policies[/bold]
3. Big Boss is to ensure that Space Law is being correctly applied. This should be done in cooperation with the Executive Officer and Warden.
4. Big Boss is [bold]heavily encourage[/bold] to give the provided pinpointer(s) to the Executive Officer. If the Executive Officer is not available, then the Warden. If neither are available on the current station, refer to the [bold]Chain of Command[/bold].
5. Big Boss may keep Big Boss spare IDs in their room or give it to the appropriate members in the [bold]Chain of Command[/bold].
6. Big Boss is not to leave the Station unless given specific permission by the Patriots.
7. Big Boss must keep the Nuclear Authentication Disk on their person at all times.
8. Big Boss is to attempt to resolve every issue that arises in Command locally before contacting the Patriots.
9. Big Boss, despite being in charge of the Station, is not independent from NanoTrasen. Any attempts to disregard general company policy are to be considered an instant condition for contract termination.
10. Firing a Head of Staff [bold]must[/bold] be done with reasonable justification. Refer to [bold]Dismissal/Demotion Policies[/bold].
11. Big Boss may carry their weaponry on them at all times.
